index.lede: A fitness app built like a workshop notebook: precise, editorial, brutalist. No confetti. No jargon. Just your body, your numbers, your progress.

stack.title: Stack reset
stack.desc: Next 16 · React 19 · Tailwind v4 · shadcn new-york. Legacy archived.

design.title: Design system live
design.desc: CSS-first tokens + Fraunces / Manrope / JetBrains Mono. Signature orange preserved.

next.title: Up next
next.desc: Supabase auth · i18n middleware FR/NL/EN · dashboard · live session.

hero.lede: A fitness app built like a workshop notebook: precise, editorial, brutalist. No confetti. No jargon. Just your body, your numbers, your progress.

placeholder.label: COMING NEXT
placeholder.body: The real dashboard is on its way: your last session, your records, your upcoming sessions, your progress graphs.

login.metaDescription: Sign in to IronTrack with a magic link. No password required.
login.title: Welcome back.
login.lede: Sign in with Google or get a magic link by email. No password to remember.
login.editorialQuote: "The iron never lies. Neither do your numbers."
login.editorialAttribution: A fitness app built like a workshop notebook. No empty gamification, no anxiety-driven notifications. Just your data, your progress, your routine.

form.hint: By continuing, you accept our terms and privacy policy (GDPR).

checkEmail.title: Check your inbox.
checkEmail.body: If the address is valid, you'll receive a link in a few seconds. Don't forget to check spam.

errors.emailInvalid: This email address is not valid.
errors.rateLimit: Too many attempts. Try again in a minute.

error.title: Invalid or expired link.
error.body: This magic link no longer works. Request a new one.
